conservation_status: CITES Appendix II (roots/whole plants; seeds exempt)
notes: Order ASAP. Fastest path for dried root prop. Year-round stock. Price verify at mountainroseherbs.com before ordering.

conservation_status: CITES Appendix II; state endangered CT/GA/ME/MA/MN/NJ/NC
product_description: Dried root 1 oz — photograph cross-section misted within 5 min
notes: Photograph cross-section within 5 min of misting — yellow color oxidizes quickly
Add "ship ASAP — photography deadline May 20" in order notes. Seeds supplementary to dried root — not critical if delayed

product_description: Live potted plant — ships March through July
column26: Must arrive by May 19 for 48-hour acclimatization before shooting. If arrives after May 20: use iNaturalist CC-BY fallback for all photos

conservation_status: QC threatened (commercial harvest banned); NY var. burdickii endangered
product_description: Ramps bulblets spring stock — call to confirm availability before ordering
notes: CALL FIRST before placing online order — spring stock may be exhausted. Fresh leaves from farmers market are the primary prop regardless

product_description: Fresh ramp leaves — purchase day before or day of shoot
column26: Leaves hold 48 hours refrigerated in damp paper towel. Buy no earlier than May 17. Mist just before photographing.

conservation_status: Regional special concern (shortgrass prairie / NE habitats)
vendor: Local garden center (Home Depot / Lowe's / independent)
product_description: Potted plant 4-6 inch — ask for straight species not cultivar
column26: Zero lead time. Note cultivar name if straight species unavailable (cultivar acceptable as habit prop). If any buds present: delay flower head closeup 3-5 days until open

conservation_status: UpS At-Risk; NY Exploitably Vulnerable; RI Special Concern
product_description: Rhizome / bare root — spring stock narrow window
notes: June follow-on guide. If Prairie Moon spring rhizome stock is exhausted: guide proceeds on iNaturalist CC-BY and BHL illustration only — $0 procurement cost. Low budget priority relative to Core Four.

conservation_status: UpS Critical (genus); protected in MN; two congeners federally endangered
product_description: Bare root division — T. grandiflorum or T. erectum (legal cultivated spp.)
notes: June follow-on guide. DO NOT source T. persistens or T. reliquum (federally endangered). Only grandiflorum / erectum / luteum / sessile are appropriate.

conservation_status: UpS Critical; state-protected nearly all states; wild collection illegal
product_description: Photo licensing request — no physical specimen
notes: No physical specimen order — cost-prohibitive ($35-85 per tissue-culture plant). Entirely institutional photo licensing path. June follow-on guide. If Hillside Nursery does not respond by May 30: use best available iNaturalist CC-BY frames.
